name: Meatballs in Chipotle Sauce
recipeInstructions:
See Sowest 2 for recipe.
Prepare Chipotle Sauce and set aside. Mix remaining ingredients together and shape into 1 1/2-inch meatballs. Heat sauce until boiling; then reduce heat. Cover and simmer until meatballs are done, about 20 minutes. Serve with hot cooked rice or noodles, if desired.
